title: Crispy Quesadilla Bites
description: A twist on traditional Japanese cuisine, these crispy quesadilla bites are a unique appetizer or snack.
instructions: In a pan, heat 1/4 cup of oil over medium heat.
Add the triangles to the pan and cook until crispy, about 2-3 minutes per side.
While the triangles are cooking, mix the bean and American cheese in a bowl.
Once the triangles are done, place a spoonful of the bean mixture onto each triangle.
Fold the triangles in half and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the cheese is melted.
Drain on paper towels and serve hot.
